headline: Airline Stocks Spent 6 Years Below Covid Highs: Hormuz Snapped That Trend In Two Months
summary: The JETS ETF climbed above its pre-Covid highs for the first time as falling oil prices, disciplined capacity and resilient travel demand lifted airline stocks.
